headline: T-Mobile Verizon Legal Clash And Promotions Shape Churn And Valuation Outlook
summary: T-Mobile US (NasdaqGS:TMUS) has filed a lawsuit against Verizon accusing the rival of deceptive advertising practices. Verizon has responded with its own legal actions, intensifying a long running competitive dispute between the two carriers. At the same time, T-Mobile is addressing higher customer churn with aggressive device promotions and expanded home internet offerings. Customer facing moves include same day device delivery, targeted discounts, and larger bundle incentives aimed at...
